subject: Cannot access my account
description: I have been locked out of my account after too many failed login attempts. Please help.

subject: Refund not processed after 10 days
description: I requested a refund on February 10th but it still has not appeared in my bank account.

subject: Application crashes when uploading files
description: Every time I try to upload a file larger than 5MB the application crashes without any error message.

subject: Feature request for bulk export
description: It would be a useful enhancement to add bulk data export functionality to the admin dashboard.

subject: Production server is down for all users
description: The production environment is completely down. All users are unable to access the system. This is critical.
